title: styrax oblongus
intro: Styrax oblongus, also known as Indian styrax or styrax, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, belonging to the family Styracaceae. The medicinal properties of Styrax oblongus include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health conditions. The health benefits of using Styrax oblongus include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Styrax oblongus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as essential oils, tinctures, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
